title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? MakeMyTrip in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MakeMyTrip:
MakeMyTrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip!
